content:
@everyone 

Good day, everyone 👋.  As some of you may already know, I am the owner of **Mythag University**, a Morimens English server fan community.  I've been helping out behind the scenes for a while now, and i want to take this moment to introduce myself and see what the community wants on the server.

I am all about assisting the community, therefore here I am. We do have plans for the server but before that we would like to hear from you 🙏🥰 .

I've been lurking, and it appears that the community wants additional English/Chinese channels.  So I'm here to ask what channels you want on the server, as well as any ideas or suggestions for changes to the server.

This is your server, and we want to make you feel at home.🙏 ❤️ 🙏

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

大家好 👋。有些人可能已经知道，我是**Mythag University**的拥有者，这是一个Morimens英语服务器的粉丝社区。我已经在幕后帮忙一段时间了，想借此机会介绍一下自己，了解一下社区对服务器的需求。

我全心全意为社区服务，所以我来了。我们确实有一些服务器计划，但在此之前，我们想听听你们的意见 🙏🥰。 

我一直在潜水，看来社区希望增加英语/中文频道。所以我来这里是想问问你们希望在服务器上添加哪些频道，以及你们对服务器修改的任何想法或建议。 这是你们的服务器，我想让你们有宾至如归的感觉。🙏 ❤️ 🙏

- A "Team building" channel, to be able to help beginner more easily without all the flood from random convs. Also if the channel is all about that, the logs in it would be a good ressource for others by just reading previous messages
- Maybe a "Saloon" type, where people can talk about anything not related to Morimens, without flooding the morimens channel.
